ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Control the size of the vector. Higher dimensions mean better search but larger index.
ast.target: 控制向量的大小。更高的维度意味着更好的搜索效果，但索引也会更大。

ast.name: appendText

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Debounce delay for background indexing while typing.
ast.target: 输入时后台索引的防抖延迟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay between files during indexing to respect API rate limits.
ast.target: 索引期间文件间的延迟，以遵守 API 速率限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of retries for spotty connections.
ast.target: 针对不稳定连接的重试次数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Score relative to top match required for full file content inclusion.
ast.target: 相对于最佳匹配所需分数，以包含完整文件内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Score relative to top match required for snippet inclusion.
ast.target: 相对于最佳匹配所需分数，以包含代码片段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Score relative to top match required for header inclusion. Below this, notes are skipped.
ast.target: 相对于最佳匹配所需分数，以包含标题。低于此分数，笔记将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max number of "bridge" nodes to pull in from the graph to expand search context. Higher values improve thematic recall but increase token usage.
ast.target: 从图中拉取以扩展搜索上下文的最大“桥接”节点数。更高的值可提高主题召回率，但会增加令牌使用量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Safety limit for total number of documents injected into context.
ast.target: 注入上下文的文档总数的安全限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all search and context tuning values to their defaults.
ast.target: 将所有搜索和上下文调优值恢复为默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用于调试的控制台详细程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows the agent to access localhost and private network IPs.
ast.target: 允许代理访问本地主机和私有网络 IP。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure a provider and fetch models to filter them.
ast.target: 配置提供商并获取模型以进行筛选。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Server url for local model provider.
ast.target: 本地模型提供商的服务器 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The specific model used to generate vector embeddings.
ast.target: 用于生成向量嵌入的特定模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: HuggingFace model id (must be ONNX compatible).
ast.target: HuggingFace 模型 ID（必须兼容 ONNX）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The output vector size. Incorrect values break search.
ast.target: 输出向量大小。不正确的值会破坏搜索。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Relevance threshold. Results below this are hidden.
ast.target: 相关性阈值。低于此分数的结果将被隐藏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max results displayed in the sidebar.
ast.target: 侧边栏中显示的最大结果数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of nodes to render in the semantic galaxy view.
ast.target: 语义星系视图中可渲染的最大节点数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visual weight of explicit wikilinks in the semantic galaxy.
ast.target: 语义星系中显式 Wiki 链接的视觉权重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visual weight of implied AI relationships in the semantic galaxy.
ast.target: 语义星系中隐含的 AI 关系的视觉权重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Calibration for keyword vs vector search. Higher values make keyword matches more conservative.
ast.target: 关键词与向量搜索的校准。更高的值使关键词匹配更保守。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wipe and rebuild all embeddings. Required after changing models.
ast.target: 清除并重建所有嵌入。更换模型后必需。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model used for analysis and suggesting improvements.
ast.target: 用于分析和建议改进的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The base persona and hygiene rules. Use {{ONTOLOGY_FOLDERS}} and {{NOTE_COUNT}} as placeholders.
ast.target: 基础角色和卫生规则。使用 {{ONTOLOGY_FOLDERS}} 和 {{NOTE_COUNT}} 作为占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where concepts, entities, and MOCs are stored.
ast.target: 存储概念、实体和 MOC 的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Duration to keep plan files before purging.
ast.target: 清除前保留计划文件的持续时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Search for a folder to ignore.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max number of recent notes to scan for improvements.
ast.target: 扫描以进行改进的最大最近笔记数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wait duration before re-examining unchanged files.
ast.target: 重新检查未更改文件前的等待时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to remember skipped files.
ast.target: 记住被跳过文件的时长。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Similarity score required to merge two isolated topics (from 0.5 to 1.0). Set to 1.0 to disable semantic merging.
ast.target: 合并两个孤立主题所需的相似度分数（0.5 到 1.0）。设置为 1.0 可禁用语义合并。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A friendly name for this server (e.g., "GitHub" + " info)")
ast.target: 此服务器的友好名称（例如，“GitHub” + “信息”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stdio runs a local binary. Remote options connect to a URL.
ast.target: Stdio 运行本地二进制文件。远程选项连接到 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter arguments line by line (one argument per line). Avoids command-line string escaping issues.
ast.target: 逐行输入参数（每行一个参数）。避免命令行字符串转义问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, you will be prompted to confirm every execution of this server's tools. Turn off only for explicitly safe, read-only tools.
ast.target: 如果开启，每次执行此服务器的工具时都会提示您确认。仅对明确安全、只读的工具关闭此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The main engine used for reasoning and answering questions.
ast.target: 用于推理和回答问题的主要引擎。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The language the agent should respond in.
ast.target: 代理应使用的响应语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a specific language name or code.
ast.target: 输入特定的语言名称或代码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines the behavior and persona of the agent. Use {{DATE}} to insert the current date and {{LANGUAGE}} for the selected language.
ast.target: 定义代理的行为和角色。使用 {{DATE}} 插入当前日期，使用 {{LANGUAGE}} 插入所选语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of "thoughts" (loops) the agent can take before giving an answer.
ast.target: 代理在给出答案前可以采取的最大“思考”（循环）次数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name used for queries referring to self. Fallback for missing author frontmatter.
ast.target: 用于指代自身的查询名称。缺失作者前置数据时的回退值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of frontmatter properties to include in the semantic context of each chunk.
ast.target: 逗号分隔的前置数据属性列表，用于包含在每个块的语义上下文中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows the agent to search the internet for live information, facts, and news.
ast.target: 允许代理搜索互联网以获取实时信息、事实和新闻。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model used for verifying facts and searching the web.
ast.target: 用于验证事实和搜索网络的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows the agent to create and update notes in your vault. Always requires manual confirmation.
ast.target: 允许代理在您的保险库中创建和更新笔记。始终需要手动确认。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of notes the researcher can retrieve to answer a single question.
ast.target: 研究员为回答单个问题可检索的最大笔记数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Completely removes all local indexes, cached models, and stored states. Use this if you encounter persistent errors or wish to clean up all plugin data.
ast.target: 完全移除所有本地索引、缓存模型和存储状态。如果您遇到持续性错误或希望清除所有插件数据，请使用此选项。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 允许本地网络访问（高级/有风险）

ast.name: setPlaceholder

ast.name: setText

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Manage local vector databases and sharded storage.
ast.target: 管理本地向量数据库和分片存储。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The plugin stores separate indexes for different embedding models to prevent data corruption. Below are the shards currently stored in your vault.
ast.target: 插件为不同的嵌入模型存储单独的索引以防止数据损坏。以下是当前存储在您库中的分片。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid API key. Check your settings.
ast.target: API密钥无效。请检查您的设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This dimension works best with modern models like `gemini-embedding-001`. Please check your model selection.
ast.target: 此维度与`gemini-embedding-001`等现代模型配合效果最佳。请检查您的模型选择。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Purging all data... Click here to confirm or wait to cancel.
ast.target: 正在清除所有数据... 点击此处确认或等待取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 所有数据已清除。正在重新加载插件...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Purge failed. Check console for details.
ast.target: 清除失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Custom models should be configured in settings.
ast.target: 自定义模型应在设置中配置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Secure storage unavailable. Storing API key as plain text.
ast.target: 安全存储不可用。将以明文形式存储API密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: 用于$data引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema扩展提案）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fast, efficient, and great for most tasks.
ast.target: 快速、高效，适用于大多数任务。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 为复杂推理提供最高智能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Large flagship model for maximum performance. Supports Matryoshka (256, 512, 1024, 2048).
ast.target: 用于最大性能的大型旗舰模型。支持Matryoshka（256, 512, 1024, 2048）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Newest flagship model. High performance across all tasks. Supports Matryoshka (256, 512, 1024, 2048).
ast.target: 最新旗舰模型。在所有任务中均表现出高性能。支持Matryoshka（256, 512, 1024, 2048）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optimized for speed and efficiency. Supports Matryoshka (256, 512, 1024, 2048).
ast.target: 针对速度和效率进行了优化。支持Matryoshka（256, 512, 1024, 2048）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional HTTP headers for authentication or proxy configuration. Use 'Secret' to securely store tokens in the device keychain.
ast.target: 用于身份验证或代理配置的可选HTTP头。使用'Secret'在设备钥匙串中安全存储令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define environment variables. Use 'Secret' to securely store API keys in the device keychain.
ast.target: 定义环境变量。使用'Secret'在设备钥匙串中安全存储API密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional HTTP headers for authentication. Use 'Secret' to securely store tokens in the device keychain.
ast.target: 用于身份验证的可选HTTP头。使用'Secret'在设备钥匙串中安全存储令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the user's personal Obsidian notes (vault) for information and context.
ast.target: 搜索用户个人的Obsidian笔记（保险库）以获取信息和上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query to find relevant notes.
ast.target: 用于查找相关笔记的搜索查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the content of a specific external URL.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perform a Google search to find the latest real-world information, facts, dates, or news.
ast.target: 执行Google搜索以查找最新的现实世界信息、事实、日期或新闻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find notes linked to or from a specific note. Use this to discover context not immediately visible in search results.
ast.target: 查找链接到特定笔记或从特定笔记链接的笔记。使用此功能可发现搜索结果中不立即可见的上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The path of the note to find connections for.
ast.target: 要查找连接的笔记的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use this tool to solve math problems, perform complex logic, or analyze data using code execution.
ast.target: 使用此工具解决数学问题、执行复杂逻辑或使用代码执行分析数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The math problem or logic task to solve (e.g., 'Calculate the 50th Fibonacci number').
ast.target: 要解决的数学问题或逻辑任务（例如，'计算第50个斐波那契数'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new note in the vault. Will create parent folders recursively if they don't exist.
ast.target: 在保险库中创建新笔记。如果父文件夹不存在，将递归创建它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The markdown content of the note. Do NOT include frontmatter.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vault-absolute path where the note should be created (e.g., 'Projects/Project A/Meeting.md').
ast.target: 笔记应创建的保险库绝对路径（例如，'Projects/Project A/Meeting.md'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update an existing note in the vault.
ast.target: 更新保险库中的现有笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new content or text to add.
ast.target: 要添加的新内容或文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to update: 'append' (add to end), 'prepend' (add to start), or 'overwrite' (replace entirely).
ast.target: 更新方式：'append'（添加到末尾）、'prepend'（添加到开头）或'overwrite'（完全替换）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vault-absolute path of the note.
ast.target: 笔记的保险库绝对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move a note. Updates all internal links automatically.
ast.target: 重命名或移动笔记。自动更新所有内部链接。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 当前的保险库绝对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new folder path recursively.
ast.target: 递归创建新的文件夹路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List the contents of a folder.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full raw content of a note. Use this if you need to refactor or see the complete text of a file.
ast.target: 读取笔记的完整原始内容。如果您需要重构或查看文件的完整文本，请使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all available external resources provided by connected MCP servers (e.g., files, database schemas, etc.). Use this to discover what resources you can read.
ast.target: 列出连接的MCP服务器提供的所有可用外部资源（例如，文件、数据库模式等）。使用此功能可发现您可以读取哪些资源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the content of a specific MCP resource. You must provide the serverId and uri obtained from the list_mcp_resources tool.
ast.target: 读取特定MCP资源的内容。您必须提供从list_mcp_resources工具获得的serverId和uri。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ID of the MCP server providing the resource.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URI of the resource to read.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 介于0和1之间的相关性分数

ast.name: error
ast.source: Header key must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 头部键必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: Header key contains invalid characters (only alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen allowed)
ast.target: 头部键包含无效字符（仅允许字母数字、下划线、连字符）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Google Search is not supported by the current provider.
ast.target: 当前提供商不支持Google搜索。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Access to local network, private IP addresses, or restricted protocols is forbidden for security reasons. You can enable 'Local Network Access' in Advanced Settings if this is intended.
ast.target: 出于安全原因，禁止访问本地网络、私有IP地址或受限协议。如果这是预期行为，您可以在高级设置中启用'本地网络访问'。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Code execution is not supported by the current provider.
ast.target: 当前提供商不支持代码执行。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Agent write access is disabled. The user must enable 'Write' in the chat view or globally in plugin settings.
ast.target: 代理写入访问已禁用。用户必须在聊天视图中或全局插件设置中启用'写入'。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Permission Denied: Agent is not allowed to perform write or move operations involving excluded paths.
ast.target: 权限被拒绝：不允许代理执行涉及排除路径的写入或移动操作。

ast.name: error
ast.source: CRITICAL SYSTEM ERROR: You did not provide any text in the 'content' argument! Do NOT generate the file text in your conversation output! You MUST place the final text inside the 'content' parameter of this tool call. Please call the tool again correctly.
ast.target: 严重系统错误：您未在'content'参数中提供任何文本！不要在对话输出中生成文件文本！您必须将最终文本放在此工具调用的'content'参数中。请正确地再次调用该工具。

ast.name: error
ast.source: MCP Client Manager is not available.

ast.name: error
ast.source: serverId and uri arguments are required.

ast.name: label
ast.target: 平衡型 (欧洲语言 E5 Small) - 384d [~30MB]

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配 anyOf 中的某个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须精确匹配 oneOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: URL cannot use javascript:, data:, or vbscript: scheme
ast.target: URL 不能使用 javascript:、data: 或 vbscript: 协议

ast.name: name
ast.source: Gardener: organize vault concepts (new files only)
ast.target: 园丁：整理保险库概念（仅限新文件）

ast.name: streamable_http
ast.target: 可流式传输的 HTTP (远程)

ast.name: text
ast.source: View the Ollama guide to troubleshoot
ast.target: 查看 Ollama 指南以进行故障排除

ast.name: text
ast.source: [Tool execution was cancelled by the user]

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changing this triggers a full vault re-embedding on exit.
ast.target: 更改此设置将在退出时触发整个保险库的重新嵌入。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tune how search expands results and assembles context.
ast.target: 调整搜索如何扩展结果和组装上下文。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 诊断工具和日志详细程度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: This makes you vulnerable to SSRF (Server-Side Request Forgery) and DNS Rebinding attacks. Malicious external websites could resolve to local IP addresses and bypass standard URL checks if the agent reads malicious notes or prompt injections. Use with caution.
ast.target: 警告：这会使您容易受到 SSRF（服务器端请求伪造）和 DNS 重绑定攻击。如果代理读取恶意笔记或提示注入，恶意外部网站可能会解析为本地 IP 地址并绕过标准 URL 检查。请谨慎使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hide specific models from dropdown menus to reduce clutter.
ast.target: 从下拉菜单中隐藏特定模型以减少杂乱。

ast.name: text
ast.source: To use a new key, click "Link" to select or create a secret. Credentials are stored securely and not synced.
ast.target: 要使用新密钥，请单击“链接”以选择或创建密钥。凭据将安全存储且不会同步。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how the explorer finds connections and similar notes in your vault.
ast.target: 配置探索者如何在您的保险库中查找连接和相似笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Local embeddings download model weights (~25MB - 150MB) once. Analysis is performed 100% offline.
ast.target: 本地嵌入会一次性下载模型权重（约 25MB - 150MB）。分析 100% 离线执行。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 本体：匹配现有本体笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All: every folder is a semantic topic.
ast.target: 全部：每个文件夹都是一个语义主题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changing this triggers a full vault re-scan on exit.
ast.target: 更改此项将在退出时触发完整的保险库重新扫描。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connect external model context protocol (MCP) servers to allow AI models to perform external actions, such as fetching weather, reading databases, or integrating with other tools.
ast.target: 连接外部模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器，以允许AI模型执行外部操作，例如获取天气、读取数据库或与其他工具集成。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Personalise your research assistant’s intelligence and capabilities.
ast.target: 个性化您的研究助手的智能和能力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Analyzing vault. This may take a few seconds.
ast.target: 正在分析保险库。这可能需要几秒钟。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will move all links to the target topic and permanently delete the source file!
ast.target: 这将把所有链接移动到目标主题，并永久删除源文件！

ast.name: text
ast.source: The agent wants to perform the following action:
ast.target: 代理希望执行以下操作：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will completely overwrite the existing note content.
ast.target: 这将完全覆盖现有笔记内容。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 笔记内容或更新（请仔细检查）

ast.name: text
ast.source: I'm sorry, I reached the step limit before finding a definitive answer. Please try rephrasing or check your settings.
ast.target: \n\n抱歉，我在找到明确答案之前达到了步骤限制。请尝试重新措辞或检查您的设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a note to see similar connections.
ast.target: 打开一个笔记以查看相似的连接。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Adjust how strongly similar notes pull together
ast.target: 调整相似笔记相互吸引的强度
